groundTruth: repository-history-only, commit-grounded (revert / hotfix / survived); no model or human opinion

agreementWithAiLabels.note: Binary projection broken-vs-clean over PRs where both sources decided (outcome != indeterminate and AI != ambiguous). outcome broken = reverted|hotfixed.
